Grand Total Store Sales:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(Store, 'GRAND TOTAL') as Store,
  COUNT(*) as Rows,
  CAST(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as Qty,
  CAST(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as "Total Price",
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2)) < 0 THEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as "Neg Total"
FROM dataset
GROUP BY ROLLUP(Store)
ORDER BY Store IS NULL, Store
Store Sales (Date Range):
SELECT 
  COALESCE(Store, 'GRAND TOTAL') as Store,
  COUNT(*) as Rows,
  CAST(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as Qty,
  CAST(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as "Total Price",
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2)) < 0 THEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as "Neg Total"
FROM dataset
WHERE CAST("Invoice Date" AS DATE) >= '2024-01-01'
  AND CAST("Invoice Date" AS DATE) <= '2026-04-01'
GROUP BY ROLLUP(Store)
ORDER BY Store IS NULL, Store
Dead Stock & Margin Optimization:
WITH InventoryPerformance AS
  (-- Calculate stock health and turnover efficiency
 SELECT i."Item #",
        i."Description",
        i."Department",
        i."Qty on Hand",
        i."Inventory Value",
        i."Retail" AS Current_Retail, -- Calculate GMROI (Gross Margin Return on Investment) proxy
 CAST(i."YTD Sales $ Retail" - i."YTD Sales $ Cost" AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(i."Inventory Value", 0) AS GMROI_Proxy, -- Identify "Dead Stock" (No sales in 13 months but have stock)
 CASE
     WHEN i."Units Sold 13mo" = 0
          AND i."Qty on Hand" > 0 THEN 'Dead'
     WHEN i."Qty on Hand" < i."Order Point" THEN 'Restock'
     ELSE 'Healthy'
 END AS Stock_Status
   FROM t_01_inventory i),
     InvoiceStats AS
  (-- Get actual average transaction price vs current price
 SELECT "SKU",
        COUNT(DISTINCT "Invoice #") AS Transaction_Count,
        AVG("Price") AS Avg_Selling_Price,
        SUM("Qty Sold") AS Total_Units_Sold
   FROM t_06_invoices_detail
   GROUP BY 1)
SELECT ip."Department",
       c."Dept Name",
       ip."Description",
       ip."Qty on Hand",
       ip."Inventory Value",
       ip.Stock_Status,
       ROUND(ip.GMROI_Proxy, 2) AS Margin_Efficiency,
       ROUND(inv.Avg_Selling_Price, 2) AS Actual_Avg_Price, -- Price Variance: Are we discounting too much vs our listed Retail?
 ROUND(ip.Current_Retail - inv.Avg_Selling_Price, 2) AS Price_Leakage
FROM InventoryPerformance ip
LEFT JOIN InvoiceStats inv ON ip."Item #" = inv."SKU"
LEFT JOIN t_03_categories c ON ip."Department" = c."Dept Code"
WHERE ip."Inventory Value" > 500 -- Focus on high-capital items
ORDER BY ip.Stock_Status DESC,
         ip."Inventory Value" DESC;
Top performing category:
SELECT 
    c."Dept Name",
    c."Class Name",
    SUM(d."Extension") AS total_sales,
    ROUND(AVG(d."Unit Margin"), 2) AS avg_unit_margin
FROM t_06_invoices_detail d
JOIN t_01_inventory i ON d."SKU" = i."SKU"
JOIN t_03_categories c ON i."Department" = c."Dept Code" AND i."Class" = c."Class Code"
GROUP BY ALL
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
basket anaysis:
SELECT 
    "Tender Type",
    COUNT("Invoice #") AS num_invoices,
    ROUND(AVG("Transaction Total"), 2) AS avg_basket_size,
    ROUND(SUM("Transaction Total"), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM t_05_invoices_header
GROUP BY 1;
Best hours:
SELECT 
    extract('hour' FROM "Invoice Time") AS hour_of_day,
    COUNT("Invoice #") AS transaction_count,
    ROUND(SUM("Transaction Total"), 2) AS hourly_revenue
FROM t_05_invoices_header
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY hourly_revenue DESC;
Loyalty Scoring:
WITH CustomerMetrics AS (
    SELECT 
        "Customer #",
        -- Recency: Days since last purchase
        current_date - MAX("Invoice Date") AS recency,
        -- Frequency: Number of unique invoices
        COUNT(DISTINCT "Invoice #") AS frequency,
        -- Monetary: Total spend
        SUM("Transaction Total") AS monetary
    FROM t_05_invoices_header
    GROUP BY 1
),
Percentiles AS (
    SELECT *,
        -- Divide customers into 5 groups for each metric
        ntile(5) OVER (ORDER BY recency DESC) AS r_score,
        ntile(5) OVER (ORDER BY frequency ASC) AS f_score,
        ntile(5) OVER (ORDER BY monetary ASC) AS m_score
    FROM CustomerMetrics
)
SELECT 
    "Customer #",
    r_score, f_score, m_score,
    CASE 
        WHEN r_score >= 4 AND f_score >= 4 AND m_score >= 4 THEN 'Champions'
        WHEN f_score >= 4 THEN 'Loyal Customers'
        WHEN r_score <= 2 THEN 'At Risk / Churning'
        ELSE 'Typical'
    END AS customer_segment
FROM Percentiles;
Zero-Sales Inventory:
SELECT 
    "Description",
    "Department",
    "Qty on Hand",
    "Inventory Value",
    "Date Last Sale",
    "Units Sold 13mo"
FROM t_01_inventory
WHERE "Units Sold 13mo" = 0 
  AND "Qty on Hand" > 0
  AND "Discontinued" = 'N'
ORDER BY "Inventory Value" DESC;
GMROI Analysis:
WITH AnnualSales AS (
    SELECT 
        "SKU",
        SUM("Extension" - "Cost Extension") AS annual_gross_profit,
        SUM("Extension") AS total_revenue
    FROM t_06_invoices_detail
    WHERE "Invoice Date" > current_date - INTERVAL '1 year'
    GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT 
    i."Description",
    i."Department",
    s.annual_gross_profit,
    -- GMROI = Gross Profit / Average Inventory Cost
    -- Note: We use "Avg Cost" * "Qty on Hand" as a proxy for investment
    ROUND(s.annual_gross_profit / NULLIF(i."Qty on Hand" * i."Avg Cost", 0), 2) AS gmroi,
    -- Inventory Turnover: How many times you sold through your stock
    ROUND(s.total_revenue / NULLIF(i."Qty on Hand" * i."Retail", 0), 2) AS stock_turnover
FROM t_01_inventory i
JOIN AnnualSales s ON i."SKU" = s."SKU"
WHERE i."Qty on Hand" > 0
ORDER BY gmroi DESC;
